panels.label: Update Runway Overview
panels.purpose: Show the full governed update-control chain.

panels.label: Governed Update Inspector
panels.purpose: Show metadata-only update candidate inspection.

panels.label: Staged Update Sandbox
panels.purpose: Show sandbox contract status without creating sandbox files.

panels.label: Controlled Validation Plan
panels.purpose: Show planned validation commands without executing them.

panels.label: Update Evidence Review Queue
panels.purpose: Show evidence bundles and review packets.

panels.label: Validation Result Intake
panels.purpose: Show manually supplied validation result intake packets.

panels.label: Promotion Decision Packet
panels.purpose: Show promotion eligibility and blockers.

panels.label: Rollback Recovery Gate
panels.purpose: Show rollback proof and recovery gate blockers.

panels.label: Operator Staged Update Handoff
panels.purpose: Show approval/handoff boundary and final blockers.

panels.label: Blocked Authority Matrix
panels.purpose: Show all disabled update authorities.

registry_rules: Panel registration does not create routes or apply updates.

action_rules: Disabled buttons make blocked authorities visible.
No cockpit button executes updates in this phase.
